description: Phase 1 forward-compat: dynamic-routing fields (onPass/onFail/onWarning/onSkip, if, assertions) validate everywhere and are ignored by the runner. The runShell action re-validates the step against step_v3 internally, so an unrecognized field would FAIL the step. This spec must resolve PASS on every OS.

steps.description: Cross-platform command (Node is always present). Inert routing attached.
